hero.heading: Travel smarter with <1>GoBus</1>
hero.description: Find and book bus trips across the country. Real-time tracking, easy booking, and reliable service.

realTimeTracking.title: Real-time tracking
realTimeTracking.description: Track your bus live on the map. Know exactly when it arrives.

secureBooking.title: Secure booking
secureBooking.description: Book with confidence. Instant confirmation and easy cancellation.

wideCoverage.title: Wide coverage
wideCoverage.description: Hundreds of routes connecting cities and towns across the country.
